name: Caribbean Shrimp and Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 (15 oz) can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 small Green or red pepper, cut into short, thin strips
1 Lime (2 Tbsp juice and 1 tsp shredded peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shrimp, beans, pepper, celery, and onion in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients except tomatoes. Add 1/2 tsp salt and mix well.
3. Pour the dressing over the shrimp mixture; toss lightly to coat.
4. Cover and chill at least 2 hours or up to 24 hours, tossing lightly occasionally.
5. Spoon salad onto lettuce-lined plates and garnish with tomatoes.
